TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_ljemaljeqelan_nu_salilim, title = ljemaljeqelan_nu_salilim, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/ljemaljeqelan_nu_salilim} }

S.FORM: masantjelu a sinantjaucikelan aicu a "ljemaljeqelan nu salilim" ni liciyaw , avan a sebari timadju a ngemaingayan a kisanvenecik ta tjaucikel. a itua za sinansunatj a tjinaucikel mavan a cinalivatan nua caucau sengaingay, ka mangetjez tiamadju a semamaza i tayuan kasi qadjav a kacaviljan a 1936 a patje kacaviljan a 1912 tazua. izua sinaniga aza tjaucikelan a tja kineljangan a mamaw a ngadan. aza sangasangasan a kinangaingayan a sinaniga i tayuan tazua. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: masan퉍톛톬u a sinan퉍au퉍ik톛톬an ai퉍u a "툹톛ma툹톛q톛톬an nu sa톬i톬im" ni 톬i퉍ijaw , avan a s톛bari tima톌u a 콂톛mai콂ajan a kisanv톛n톛퉍ik ta 퉍au퉍ik톛톬. a itua za sinansuna퉍 a 퉍inau퉍ik톛톬 mavan a 퉍ina톬ivatan nua 퉍au퉍au s톛콂ai콂aj, ka ma콂톛퉍톛z tiama톌u a s톛mamaza i tajuan kasi qa톌av a ka퉍avi툹an a **** a pa퉍톛 ka퉍avi툹an a **** tazua. izua sinaniga aza 퉍au퉍ik톛톬an a 퉍a kin톛툹a콂an a mamaw a 콂adan. aza sa콂asa콂asan a kina콂ai콂ajan a sinaniga i tajuan tazua. == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: masantjelu a sinantjaucikelan aicu a "ljemaljeqelan nu salilim" ni liciyaw , avan a sebari timadju a ngemaingayan a kisanvenecik ta tjaucikel. a itua za sinansunatj a tjinaucikel mavan a cinalivatan nua caucau sengaingay, ka mangetjez tiamadju a semamaza i tayuan kasi qadjav a kacaviljan a 1936 a patje kacaviljan a 1912 tazua. izua sinaniga aza tjaucikelan a tja kineljangan a mamaw a ngadan. aza sangasangasan a kinangaingayan a sinaniga i tayuan tazua. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: masan퉍톛톬u a sinan퉍au퉍ik톛톬an ai퉍u a "툹톛ma툹톛q톛톬an nu sa톬i톬im" ni 톬i퉍ijaw , avan a s톛bari tima톌u a 콂톛mai콂ajan a kisanv톛n톛퉍ik ta 퉍au퉍ik톛톬. a itua za sinansuna퉍 a 퉍inau퉍ik톛톬 mavan a 퉍ina톬ivatan nua 퉍au퉍au s톛콂ai콂aj, ka ma콂톛퉍톛z tiama톌u a s톛mamaza i tajuan kasi qa톌av a ka퉍avi툹an a **** a pa퉍톛 ka퉍avi툹an a **** tazua. izua sinaniga aza 퉍au퉍ik톛톬an a 퉍a kin톛툹a콂an a mamaw a 콂adan. aza sa콂asa콂asan a kina콂ai콂ajan a sinaniga i tajuan tazua. == kaizuan ==
